chunks.text: Course: EE C227T | EECS at UC Berkeley EE C227T. Introduction to Convex Optimization Catalog Description: The course covers some convex optimization theory and algorithms, and describes various applications arising in engineering design, machine learning and statistics, finance, and operations research. The course includes laboratory assignments, which consist of hands-on experience. Units: 4 Also Offered As: INDENG C227A, ELENG C227T Formats: Fall: 3.0 hours of lecture, 1.0 hours of discussion, and 2.0 hours of laboratory per week Spring: 3.0 hours of lecture, 1.0 hours of discussion, and 2.0 hours of laboratory per week Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: No Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
